_backup_note: SyncView TikTok Upload — Submit (workflow id o6wWaGNlIlyZFTX7). Captured 2026-06-22 BEFORE migrating from upload-post.com to Post For Me (api.postforme.dev). activeVersionId at capture: 07dd92cc-2671-403c-a446-79412c4cfc72. To restore the old behavior, re-import this file or roll back to that version in the n8n UI. The single 'Call upload-post.com' HTTP node (multipart POST to https://api.upload-post.com/api/upload, credential 'Upload-Post' httpHeaderAuth) is the node being replaced by the 3-step Post For Me flow.
name: SyncView TikTok Upload — Submit
description: POST /webhook/tiktok-upload. Prefers scheduledAtUTC; else converts scheduledAt+timezone to UTC via Intl. Forwards to upload-post.com /api/upload, upserts a TikTokUploads row, returns {ok,id,status,row}.

parameters.jsCode:
const row = ($input.first() && $input.first().json) || {};
return [{ json: { ok: row.status !== 'failed', id: row.id, status: row.status, scheduled_for: row.scheduled_for, error: row.error || undefined, row } }];
